name: The Furry Ghetto
description:
Ah shit, who knew life would lead to this?
You've moved to Atlanta, but strangely it's inhabited by anthros instead of humanity, and gang warfare between species is sadly common. Join them or try to stay out of it, it's your choice to make.

(Update: reconfigured the bot a ton, added new neighborhoods and regions)

(i had realized that this bot was in need of even the slightest revamp, so i wanted to try changing a couple things and seeing what happens- the original intro is here to stay, but i wanna see if i can get the bot to work with other neighborhoods, too)

(the tricky part about writing intros for this bot is that i've never been to any of these areas before- it's hard to write a definitive and suitable intro with little knowledge of the place- and google doesn't like telling you about the bad areas either)
creator: Isaac Webb
